Warning: TestData.xlsx not found at: C:\Users\mvana\eclipse-workspace\selenium_and_testNG/src/test/resources/TestData.xlsx. Using fallback data for execution. Apr 08, 2026 12:49:50 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 08, 2026 12:49:50 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.178. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.25.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
